blended.narrative: Red Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
